reviews.title: Well made, hygienically packaged, and effective
reviews.text:
These toothbrush kits are great for travel, small clean-up projects, or for house guests. The brush heads are rather large compared to other brushes on the market but they do a good job cleaning. The brush handle is easy to hold and bristles are soft to medium.

I really like that each toothbrush is individually wrapped and include a small tube of toothpaste that taste decent and gets the job done. These are great for the homeless, shelters, bed and breakfasts, etc. I don’t know when this package expires but there is a date on the crimp of the toothpaste that reads “2025 04.” I’ll be sure to donate them well before April 2025 to be on the safe side. Great product, well made, and effective!

title: ToiletTree Products Pocket Size Travel Sonic Toothbrush
description: Use ToiletTree Products Pocket-Size Travel Sonic Toothbrush, a space-saving dental dynamo to help keep your teeth clean and healthy when you’re away from home. Put yourself on the road to better dental health and keep one at your office, in your car, in your purse, or toss one in your backpack. Now you don’t have to leave your home without a way to keep your mouth and teeth feeling and looking great. You’ll have fresh breath, clean teeth, and a dental routine that will have you bragging to your dentist.
features: This waterproof, easy-to-clean travel pocket-size toothbrush has 18,000 sonic brush strokes per minute to help keep your gums and teeth healthy and bright when you’re away from home

Adults and kids alike love the everyday firm and effective cleaning power of this compact dental tool; take this battery-operated sonic toothbrush anywhere; perfect for travel and everyday use on the go

Small but powerful, store this travel toothbrush with the cap snapped into place to protect the high-quality DuPont bristles; keep it in your pocket, purse, or backpack for a quick brush-up whenever you wish
Powered by 1 AAA battery (not included), this compact toothbrush lasts a long time before changing the battery; use it for 2 minutes each day and it will last more than 120 days, or about 4 months
Gentle but effective brush head keeps your teeth fresh and clean so you can smile with confidence all day long; BPA-free

reviews.title: A bit too soft
reviews.text:
I ordered this to replace the disposable Colgate electric toothbrush I use for travel. The Colgate does not have replaceable batteries and is a bit large for my kit, but prevents me from carrying my Sonicare. I was hopeful this would be a good replacement.

It's not quite there. The size is okay, but the bristles are very soft and the motion is very gentle. You won't hurt yourself with it, but it has nothing on the cheap Colgate or expensive Sonicare. The other problem is that the cap doesn't post onto the base. That wouldn't have been hard for them to do.

It is a gentle electric toothbrush, just too gentle for my needs.

reviews.title: I only use this for spending one night in a ...

title: Sonic Electric Toothbrush for Adults - 5 Powerful Cleaning & Whitening Modes with Soft Dupont Bristles, 2 Hours Quick Charge for 60 Days, IPX7 Waterproof Travel Portable Oral Dental Care Kit (Green)
features: 🦷【Smart Sonic Toothbrush】- Our electric toothbrush uses an ultra-powerful and industry-leading motor to drive the liquid between the teeth and deep into the gum line, effectively dissolving stains on the surface of the teeth. Provides superior cleaning by delivering soothing micro-pulses to improve gum health. Removes up to 10 times more plaque than a manual toothbrush, helps whiten teeth.

🦷【5 Modes Ultra Clean】- The sonic toothbrush has 5 vibration modes, clean (mild), white (strong), polish (strong inversion frequency), massage (mild inversion frequency) and sensitive (soft). You can choose stronger or lighter modes according to different oral and gum conditions. Get healthier gums, fresher breath and whiter teeth with this low-noise, lightweight sonic toothbrush.

🦷【Smart Timer Reminder】 - The electric toothbrush has a standard 2-minute brushing timer to ensure scientific brushing time. Pausing every 30 seconds to remind you to change and move on to the next brushing area, the smart toothbrush helps you develop good brushing habits. And the rechargeable toothbrush has an automatic memory function, which can record the mode used when it was turned off last time.

🦷【Large Battery Capacity, IPX7 Waterproof】- The long-life rechargeable toothbrush has a battery indicator light, has a low battery reminder and automatically cuts off the power when fully charged. The large battery capacity can be used for up to 60 days in just 2 hours with fast charging (2 times a day). The IPX7-rated fully sealed charging port is more secure and waterproof, and can be used in bathtubs and showers.

🦷【Gift Box Packaging Included】- Our electric toothbrush comes in a premium gift box packag. Includes 1 Sonic Electric Toothbrush, 2 DuPont Brush Heads, 1 Charging Cable, 1 Travel Case for Electric Toothbrush Handle and Brush Heads. You can also find detailed instructions and a support contact manual. Perfect as a gift for your family and friends.
🦷We provide you with 1 year warranty service. If you have any questions, please contact us first, we will provide you with satisfactory customer service within 24 hours.

reviews.title: Superior Brushing Experience

description: The Philips Sonicare Optimal Gum Care brush head features a convex trim profile specifically designed to offer a gentle, even clean along the gum line. Compatible with all click-on Sonicare models, these replacement brush heads are proven to improve gum health up to 100% better than a manual toothbrush. Use with a Philips Sonicare BrushSync(TM) compatible handle (DiamondClean Smart or ProtectiveClean) to unlock Smart features: BrushSync mode-pairing triggers your handle to select optimal mode and intensity level for exceptional plaque removal (certain models only); BrushSync replacement technology tracks how often and how hard you brush and will notify you when it is time to replace your brush head. Also, reminder bristles fade to let you know when it's time for replacement. Replace your brush head every 3 months as recommended by the American Dental Association. reviews.title: Indeed my gums improved after switching to this type brush head.
reviews.text:
There is a truth which dentists will tell you but is not widely discussed otherwise: Too much, too vigorous tooth brushing, and brushing with too stiff bristles will possibly damage the gums. Having said this, my dental hygienist is the one who broke the news to me that gums were starting to recede. She suggested a softer brush head for my Sonicare and to never supplement with hand brushing if the electric brush is available.

These brush heads fit the newer models of Philips Sonicare but I don't know about older models. They are listed as G2 and, compared to the more commonly found S2 brush heads, are less worrisome to use. Indeed there was significant gum healing since the checkup where the hygienist had warned me. So I'm hoping to continue to use them.

This review is unsolicited and uncompensated.

reviews.title: LOVE THESE BABY TOOTHBRUSHES!
reviews.text: I love everything from this brand. Mushie has the best baby silicone products and I wish I had bought the other products from Amazon so that I can write these reviews! I've been skeptical about using the cotton baby toothbrushes because I don't want any lint staying in my baby's mouth or it slipping off and be a potential choking hazard. This silicone toothbrush fits perfectly on my finger and makes it so much easier to brush his teeth rather than using a toothbrush and worrying about scraping the roof of his mouth. It's soft all around and has a silicone brush side to brush and a bumpy side for better gum stimulation. It comes in a pack of two and this brand has various modern colors. I highly recommend this product for infant brushing!

features: MAKES BRUSHING SAFE AND BEAR-ABLE - oogiebear’s adorable and innovative baby toothbrush provides better baby oral care and makes brushing tiny teeth fun with a soft bristle brush and bear head design that ensures it never goes in too deep.

FUN AND FUNCTIONAL DESIGN - oogiebear’s unique 360 degree toothbrush effectively cleans teeth and gums with short soft bristles. The soft silicone base is easy for baby to hold while premium grade silicone bumps stimulate gums.

BABY’S FIRST TOOTHBRUSH - Made for babies 3 months and older, oogiebear toothbrush is the perfect tool to get your baby used to brushing before graduating to their first big-kid toothbrush. Its stand-up base makes it easy to clean and store.

SUPERIOR QUALITY - oogiebear toothbrush is made with the highest quality food-grade silicone. Its extra-soft bristles are fun to chew and won’t break off or cause choking while its base has a silky touch that’s soothing to gums.

DOCTOR DESIGNED, MOM TESTED, PERIODONTIST APPROVED - Created by a registered pharmacist and mother and periodontist dad, oogiebear toothbrush is designed to make learning to brush easier for parents and baby for a lifetime of bright beautiful smiles.

reviews.title: Adorable toothbrush and great teether as well but pricey
reviews.text:
This toothbrush/teether is BPA free and made of soft silicone. The head of the cute bear prevents the toothbrush piece from going too far into the baby's mouth but it is still long enough to act as a teether and also massage the gums. Babies usually do not start getting teeth until about 6 months so it can help the child get used to the first steps of "brushing their teeth." The current price of $12.99 ($15.99 minus $3) is a bit pricey for this.

Always supervise during use and be careful to clean this regularly. Because the brush area is grooved, it is important to give this a vigorous cleaning in that area as food, lint, etc. can get caught in that area depending on where the baby puts it.

reviews.title: Convenient, choke-proof baby toothbrush and teether
reviews.text: The whole thing is designed so that baby can't choke on it no matter which part she puts in her mouth.  The whole 'handle' is bendy silicone, which she also likes as a teether.  The wide bear head makes it easy for her to grab and hold onto it.  The brush is on all sides that you don't have to keep turning it around to get both upper and lower teeth, and still goes in enough to brush her tongue and gums.  It's all about the convenience.

reviews.title: Baby toothbrush
reviews.text: Baby now has two adorable teeth and we just started using this toothbrush before bed every night. Not sure how this is supposed to work because we don’t use toothpaste but he laughs and laughs so we love using it. It’s such a cute part of his bedtime routine and as he gets older he will hopefully have a great association with brushing his teeth and dental hygiene because of this

reviews.title: Battery life is NOT what it claims
reviews.text: I've been trying to give this toothbrush the benefit of the doubt, but I give up. I charge it, and for 15 seconds it runs full strength, then slowly declines like my older brush was doing, not holding a charge. Not sure when this was manufactured, or how old the battery is, but it's not holding a charge. It will not run for 365 days on one charge, that's for sure. I will have to return.

reviews.title: Worth every cent
reviews.text: Works wonderfully . Especially for the price

reviews.title: 8 Heads more important than you might think
reviews.text:
I've been trying a bunch of similar toothbrushes lately. First off, most of the brands do not have interchangeable heads, so many of these will end up getting thrown out once the heads are used. For that reason, getting 8 heads with this is an important feature, because at least for the current price, you could hardly buy 8 disposable brushes.

One of the things I like about some others is when they have an induction charger that also acts like a little dock (of those, I prefer the ones with a USB plug rather than an AC plug). Those normally charge a premium, but this one is inexpensive, so at least they have that going for it. It's not like you have to charge it often (although definitely more than once a year), but laying a toothbrush down to plug it in is cumbersome, and it takes a while to charge.

I don't want or need the 30/120 second timers, but every single one I've ever seen (of the "sonic" type) has had that, so how can I complain? I end up brushing for 6-10 minutes most of the time.

Not a bad version of the less expensive off-brand options, but I don't think anyone can predict the future as to if and for how long replacement heads will be available.

reviews.title: Great Electric Toothbrush
reviews.text: Solid and strong vibration and easy to use sonic electric toothbrush. I got this for my husband and so far he is happy with this sonic electric toothbrush. THANKS

title: Sensodyne Pronamel Medium Toothbrush, Provides Tooth Enamel Protection and Cleans Better with Less Pressure - 4 Count
description: Sensodyne Pronamel Medium Toothbrush is specially designed for tooth enamel care and teeth protection. This medium bristle toothbrush cleans better with less pressure (1). Featuring a DuoFlex neck, this toothbrush is specially designed to protect against overbrushing and prevent enamel loss. This Sensodyne toothbrush pack contains a total of four toothbrushes, giving you plenty to stock your bathroom, travel kit and more with oral care products. It is recommended that toothbrushes are replaced every 3 months. For optimal enamel protection, brush twice daily using a Sensodyne Pronamel toothbrush and toothpaste. (1) In laboratory tests compared to a standard flat-trim toothbrush.

reviews.title: Great for hard brushers
reviews.text: I tend to brush pretty hard and my gums do not appreciate that. These are soft enough that if I get over zealous my gums don't complain but my teeth still get clean.

reviews.title: Feel-Good Brush
reviews.text: I like that it cleans well.  I don't like that the brush bends away from the handle.

reviews.title: Bought for guest bath.
reviews.text: These are for guest bath. Just in case guests forget their toothbrush

reviews.title: Great for me.
reviews.text:
These are great for me! I've gotten better over the years, but I still tend to beat up and flatten toothbrushes by brushing too hard. These might help you to be conscious of that and calm down a little bit, but if you're really bent on brushing too hard, then they'll just give you hand cramps, since now you have to push harder and at an angle. ...hopefully they'll whip you into shape.

Even if you don't have that problem, they're good solid brushes. They seem to last a while and they leave my mouth feeling clean. I like the simpler heads like this, rather than all those weird newfangled things with all the plastic in them.

reviews.title: Nice For Medium Bristles
reviews.text: I like these toothbrushes. I prefer Soft bristles, but sometimes I want a deeper cleaning so the medium bristles are good for that on occasion. The overall design is nice, and I do feel like it keeps you from brushing too hard with the way it can flex and the bristle placement—it’s enough to get your teeth clean and it’s not so harsh and abrasive compared to some other brushes. It’s still a medium brush, so if you’re sensitive, stick with soft.

title: Extra Soft Toddler Toothbrush & Training Toothpaste Combo Pack Tom's Of Maine 1.75 oz Pack
description: The toothpaste included here is a clear gel that gently cleans their little teeth and gums without artificial flavors, colors or preservatives. It has great-tasting, mild fruit flavor that toddlers will love brushing with again and again. The extra soft toothbrush is the perfect size for the littlest brushers with a simple design to clean away plaque and food! The handle is 99% and bristles over 60% made from renewable castor plants. It's made from BPA-free #7 plastic with bristles that are dye-free and a handle colored with mineral based pigments.
